issue: ContentProvider path-permissions without top-level permission

details.reason: Provider 'com.bianor.ams.androidtv.search.SearchProvider' uses path-permission elements but lacks a top-level permission. Paths not matched by path-permission rules fall back to the (absent) top-level permission, leaving them unprotected.
